title: BUbreakingHeadlines
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: BBC apologizes after racial slur shouted during BAFTA awards by guest with Tourette's
items.description: BAFTA and the BBC have apologized after a person with Tourette syndrome shouted a racial slur during the British Academy Film Awards

items.title: EU diplomats scramble to overcome Hungary’s threat to derail new sanctions on Russia
items.description: Hungary is blocking the EU’s latest sanctions plan against Russia, and it is also holding up new aid for Ukraine four years after Russia invaded.
